narrative:
Hanover Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,350 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
